Dr. Rashel

Dr. Rashel Vitamin C Brightening & Anti-Aging Face Serum

৳350 – ৳550

A brightening Vitamin C serum with hyaluronic acid to even tone and smooth fine lines.

Serum Brightening Anti-aging
1

Key Benefits & Skin Type

  • Vitamin C (as 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid) helps brighten skin and fade the look of sun spots and discoloration
  • Hyaluronic acid deeply hydrates and helps plump the look of skin
  • Hydrolyzed collagen supports a smoother, more youthful-looking complexion
  • Lightweight, fast-absorbing texture suitable for layering under moisturizer

Best for: Suitable for all skin types.

How to Use

Apply evenly to cleansed face and neck, morning and evening. Massage gently in circular motions until fully absorbed, then follow with a moisturizer. In the morning, always follow with sunscreen since Vitamin C is often used alongside sun protection.

Specifications

Volume100 mL / 3.38 fl. oz.
OriginDr. Rashel
FormulationLightweight brightening serum
Shelf life after opening12 months (see PAO symbol on packaging)

Full Ingredient List

Water, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Glycereth-26, Butylene Glycol, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Carbomer, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Sodium Hyaluronate, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), Phenoxyethanol

Formulas may be updated by the manufacturer from time to time — please check your product packaging for the most current ingredient list.
